REPORT.label: Informe detallado de Habilitación de Legajo

GROUP.label: Información a controlar de Empresa contratista
Información a controlar de Legajo contratista

qry:select.name: qry_legajo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as e_numero_legajo, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso as f_ingreso, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_documento as c_nro_documento, PER20_TIPOS_DOC.c_tipo_documento as c_tipo_documento, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa as d_empresa, CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.f_ingreso_planta as f_ingreso_planta
FROM CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO, PER01_PERSONAL, PER20_TIPOS_DOC, ORG03_EMPRESAS
JOIN CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO.oi_indic_activo INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_tipo_documento INNER PER20_TIPOS_DOC.oi_tipo_documento, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = \'1\' AND CCO02_PER_EMP_CONT.oi_personal_emp = {%=#PARAM:@IDs%}
ORDER BY d_ape_y_nom asc
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_emp_todos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as ID, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_atributo_ctrol as COD, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol as DES, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_emp as c_aplica_emp from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_emp != \'N\' AND CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol not in ( select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol inner CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa={%=#PARAM:@oi_empresa%} )
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_emp_todos_2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as ID, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atrib_emp_con as oi_atrib_emp_con, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_atributo_ctrol as COD, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol as DES, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_emp as c_aplica_emp, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.o_atrib_emp_con from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol inner CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa={#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_per_todos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as ID, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_atributo_ctrol as COD, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol as DES, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_per as c_aplica_per from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_per != \'N\' AND CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol not in ( select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol inner CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp={%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp%} )
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_per_todos_2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as ID, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atrib_per_con as oi_atrib_per_con, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_atributo_ctrol as COD, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.d_atributo_ctrol as DES, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_per as c_aplica_per, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.o_atrib_per_con from CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol inner CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_per
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as oi_atributo_ctrol, CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_atributo_ctrol as c_atributo_ctrol
FROM CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_per = \'S\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_per_habilitado
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as oi_atributo_ctrol, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atrib_per_con as oi_atrib_per_con, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento FROM CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol INNER CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_per = \'S\' AND CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND CCO02_ATRIB_PER_CON.f_vencimiento >= {Datetime(#PARAMIN:@fecha)}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_emp
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as oi_atributo_ctrol FROM CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_emp = \'S\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_atrib_emp_habilitado
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol as oi_atributo_ctrol, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atrib_emp_con as oi_atrib_emp_con, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento FROM CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL, CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON JOIN CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.oi_atributo_ctrol INNER CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_atributo_ctrol WHERE CCO05_ATRIB_CTROL.c_aplica_emp = \'S\' AND CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND CCO01_ATRIB_EMP_CON.f_vencimiento >= {Datetime(#PARAMIN:@fecha)}
')/ROWS/ROW
